raw_consumer_statement: In XX/XX/year>, I made XXXX XXXX payments to Citibank Home Depot to pay off my balance. No other charges were made, however, in a couple of months, I received a bill from Citibank in the amount {$100.00}. Citibank said XXXX of the payments did not go through in XXXX, even though I had confirmation from Citibank XXXX XXXX and my bank to prove the transactions occurred. After several telephone calls and no resolution, I forwarded my bank statement highlighting the payments made to Citibank Home Depot. I even sent the copies twice to XXXX different locations... still no resolution. It is now XX/XX/year> and Citibank Home Depot has sent bogus statements showing incorrect charges applied to my account. I disputed the charges again and Citibank closed out the account and issued a new credit card. I never received the new credit card but they issued a new account number. I advised Citibank that I never received the new card but they didn't care... they only wanted me to pay the {$100.00} they lost or applied to another consumer 's account. In XXXX, frustrated, upset and feeling as though Citibank was practicing deceptive credit card practices, I went to my bank and told them what was happening. XXXXXXXX XXXX  confirmed the amounts were not reversed and in a couple of days, they reversed the original {$100.00} payments that were paid in XXXX back to my checking account. When I realized they had reversed both {$100.00} payments, I immediately send it to Citibank Home Depot. Surely, this would prove both payments were made, however, Citibank did NOT correct my account instead they sent me another statement showing a new balance and no indication of the reversal transactions or the resubmission of payments. I am so frustrated with this big company 's unscrupulous credit card practices. Even though I have contacted the company on numerous occasions, spoken to supervisors, requested an escalation process but no avail, they won't even call me back. I am tried, I am old and I need someone to assist me. I feel like I am a victim of predatory lending and Citibank Home Depot don't care about getting the issue resolved in my favor, they just want me to double pay twice for the same account. I fear they are going to ruin my credit and my livelihood. One of the Citibank reps said, we know everything about you so it's no need to block out information on your bank statement. There are hundreds of complaints about the credit practices of Citibank Home Depot, CFPB please H E L P!
